creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, I know [1].  In other words, I'm simply saying it is not up-to-date, and incorrect.  The real source is https://cvs.savannah.gnu.org/viewvc/global/global/LICENSE?view=markup, which explains it all.

Keeping USES=perl5 just leads to installing Perl at build, which isn't needed, and also at runtime, which again is not needed except when using the niche scripts.  I'm all for streamlining both the build process and installation.
